title: phymatopsis albopes
side_effects: Phymatopsis albopes can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and increased heart rate due to its potential interactions with certain medications. In some cases, prolonged use of this plant has been linked to liver damage and gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, vomiting, and stomach pain. There is also a risk of overstimulation, which can lead to insomnia, anxiety, and an increase in blood pressure. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, Phymatopsis albopes can cause these and other adverse effects, posing a risk to one's health.
